hero.subtitle: Data & Development. I turn data into insight and ideas into software that works in practice.

data_engineering.title: Data Engineering
data_engineering.desc: I build pipelines that move, clean, and structure data at scale. ETL/ELT workflows, database design, and cloud infrastructure on AWS and Databricks.

machine_learning.title: Machine Learning
machine_learning.desc: Time-series forecasting, NLP, and deep learning. I like building models that solve real problems and can actually run in production.

data_analytics.title: Data Analytics
data_analytics.desc: Turning raw data into clear insight. Statistical analysis, visualization, and reporting that helps people make better decisions.

fullstack.title: Full-Stack Development
fullstack.desc: Backend logic, APIs, databases, and frontend interfaces. PHP, Python, JavaScript. Whatever gets the job done in practice.

automation.title: Automation
automation.desc: Replacing manual processes with code. Email workflows, API integrations, document generation, and scheduled jobs.

communication.title: Communication
communication.desc: 8 years as a science teacher taught me to explain complex topics clearly. I like bridging the gap between technical work and the people who use it.

projects_page.title: Projects
projects_page.intro: A selection of my work in data and development.

contact_page.title: Contact
contact_page.intro: Interested in working together? I'm open to freelance projects, consulting, and full-time opportunities in data science and engineering.
